channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: You Likely Missed Avengers: Doomsday's Secret Super Bowl Promo That Is Impressively Genius

item.description: No deep-dish drama here ... just smiles, slices and hot shots that'll melt your heart out! It's Pizza Day, and we've got more than enough to share ......
